title: centaurea × juvenalis
intro: Centaurea × juvenalis, also known as Cornflower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is also known for its various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea × juvenalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, including salves, ointments, and topical creams.
